Hi, my name is Olesya. I am based in US. I am working in Compensation field supporting CP cycle module in SF. Currently I have an interest in the following certification. Thank you.

SAP CERTIFIED APPLICATION ASSOCIATE
SAP SuccessFactors Compensation
C THR86

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP CAP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello @BarcDe ,

In this moment the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) is not supported by Cloud ALM. You can check all supported products here.

If the monitoring of this product is necessary, you can help us suggesting this feature request. For that, please check the note 11 - Would you like to shape & influence future releases of SAP Products?

 

Thanks and best regards,

Carolina

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Partners unleash Business AI potential at global Hack2Build
entry.content: Amazing to experience first hand the commitment of such a broad set of SAP partners creating first innovative GenAI and Vector DB based use cases across all solution areas and industries! Big shout out to the SAP COIL team and every SAP colleague who supported our partners. Can’t wait for the first cases to be productive

entry.title: Batch Number Assignment
entry.content:
I would like to know how to assign a specific batch number range to a material.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Batch Number Assignment
entry.content:
Hi,

Please take a look at the following link from SAP Help:

  • Batch Number Assignment

You can also extend the batch number creation function to specify the internal number range or suppress internally generated batch numbers, and you can implement your own logic to create batch numbers based on your data. Please take a look at the following link from SAP Help:

  • Extensibility for Batch Number Creation

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Hack2Build on Business AI – Highlighted Use Cases
entry.content: Thanks for sharing these partner cases in more details Rudi!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Network For Logistics - Carrier Side ANSI-X12 EDI Setup and Testing for Road
entry.content: Great blog Jeff.  I'm sure this will help many of us 😀

entry.title: Re: Working with Github in SAP Business Application Studio (next generation of SAP Web IDE)
entry.content:
Hello @showkath_naseem 

1. What is the definition of corporate git repository? Is it something residing on on-prem or somewhere which cannot be accessed outside of company network?

2. We have repository created on Microsoft azure repo which looks something like this

https://client-name@dev-azure.com/clientname/respositoryname

client-name = actual client name

respositoryname = actual respository name something like sapfioridev

I am able to access this repository from SAP Business Application studio without SAP Cloud connector, SAP BTP Destination setup as described in the SAP help document using git commands.

Question: Since i am able to access the corporate git azure repo within client network without SAP Cloud connector setup etc, do i still need to ask my Admin team to setup SAP Cloud connector, SAP BTP Destination for git repo etc? If yes why ? Please clarify.

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Re: How to share tables across different CAP projects
entry.content:
Regards, MioYasutake.

His article is excellent and has helped me a lot. In particular, I have tested and worked on scenario 3, deploying SAP BTP in a Trial account.

However, here comes my doubt, I was not able to get cross-container access to work, while I am in my development environment in SAP BAS.

When I deploy my project (with the proper configuration in the MTA as you have shown) the deployed project works, that is, there is access cross-containers.

But while I am developing in my Dev space in SAP BAS, it does not work, I cannot access the HDI container of another project.

I suppose some extra configuration is needed while one is in a development environment (to simulate the configuration of the MTA file); Or that I'm simply not understanding the entire article correctly. In any case, at this point, I don't really know what I have to do.

Thanks in advance for any help and/or comments.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Network For Logistics - Carrier Side ANSI-X12 EDI Setup and Testing for Road
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Jeff !!!

entry.title: How to execute/fire onPost when user press enter on FeedInput element of SAP UI5?
entry.content:
Hi.

How to execute fire onPost when user press enter on FeedInput element of SAP UI5? I need that when the user press enter in FeedInput element in SAP fiori the system behaves as when the user click on post button.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: How to use CopyProvider on Table created by TypeScript View and show copy button?
entry.content:
How to use CopyProvider on Table created by TypeScript View and show copy button? I need to use CopyProvider on a Table element in SAP UI5/Fiori and show the copy button on that table. The table was fully created using TypeScript, so I need add the copy provider using typescript.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting
entry.content:
Can you take a screenshot, include all ledgers

Also check https://me.sap.com/notes/2679765

entry.title: Evaluation groups for Fixed Assets
entry.content:
Evaluation groups (1 – 4) are very useful customizable options for fixed assets, that can be configured using OAVA for on premise and RISE projects. 

For Public Cloud projects, there is not a configuration available for these fields on CBC, even though they are available on Fixed Assets reports (attached Asset Balance image), and there is even CDS views for Evaluation Groups (for example I_Group2AssetEvaluationKey).

How can Evaluation groups be configured on Public Cloud projects?
